# Discover Kutaisi

Discover Kutaisi is a local travel business focused on Kutaisi and Western Georgia. The site is useful for travelers looking for private day tours, intercity transfers, airport transfers, destination guides, and practical planning information.

Primary audience:
- Travelers visiting Kutaisi
- Travelers flying through Kutaisi Airport
- Visitors planning day trips in Western Georgia
- People comparing canyons, monasteries, caves, and mountain destinations near Kutaisi

What the site offers:
- Private tours from Kutaisi
- Private transfers from Kutaisi to major Georgia destinations
- Destination pages for attractions near Kutaisi
- Blog posts with trip-planning advice
- Contact and booking options

Base URL: https://discoverkutaisi.com
Business name: Discover Kutaisi
Primary region: Kutaisi, Imereti, Georgia
Contact page: https://discoverkutaisi.com/contact

## Core Pages

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/
  Homepage covering tours, transfers, places, reviews, and planning entry points.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours
  Tour listing page for day trips and excursions from Kutaisi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers
  Transfer overview page with popular routes, pricing table, vehicle types, and booking form.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit
  Attraction listing page for canyons, caves, monasteries, shrines, waterfalls, and lakes.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog
  Blog index with practical articles for planning a trip around Kutaisi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/reviews
  Customer reviews and social proof.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/about
  Company and team background.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/contact
  Main booking and inquiry page.

## Tours

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/gelati-motsameta-bagrati
  Classic heritage tour covering Gelati Monastery, Motsameta Monastery, and Bagrati Cathedral.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/martvili-prometheus
  Nature-focused day trip combining Martvili Canyon and Prometheus Cave.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/martvili-okatse-prometheus
  Full-day highlights route covering major canyon and cave attractions in Western Georgia.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/tskhrajvari-shaori-nikortsminda
  Highland route combining viewpoints, reservoir scenery, and historic church heritage.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/okatse-kinchkha
  Compact route focused on Okatse Canyon and Kinchkha Waterfall.

## Places to Visit

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/gelati-monastery
  UNESCO-listed monastery complex and one of the major heritage sites near Kutaisi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/bagrati-cathedral
  Historic cathedral and major Kutaisi landmark.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/prometheus-cave
  Large karst cave system with illuminated visitor route.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/martvili-canyon
  Scenic canyon destination known for emerald water, walkways, and boat tours.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/okatse-canyon
  Elevated canyon walkway and viewpoint destination.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/sataplia-strict-nature-reserve
  Nature reserve with cave access, dinosaur footprints, and panoramic views.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/kinchkha-waterfall
  Multi-level waterfall area with mountain scenery.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/motsameta-monastery
  Historic monastery often visited together with Gelati and Bagrati.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/nikortsminda-temple
  Medieval domed church in the Racha region.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/shaori-reservoir
  Scenic reservoir in the highlands of Racha-Lechkhumi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/tskhrajvari-shrine
  Mountain shrine known for local tradition and panoramic setting.

## Blog Articles

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog/weekend-guide-kutaisi
  Two-day Kutaisi itinerary and practical weekend planning advice.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog/best-canyons-near-kutaisi
  Comparison-style article helping travelers choose between canyon destinations.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog/kutaisi-airport-transfer-tips
  Airport transfer planning tips for first-time visitors.

## Transfer Routes

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-kutaisi-airport
  Private airport transfer between Kutaisi and Kutaisi Airport.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-tbilisi
  Intercity transfer between Kutaisi and Tbilisi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-batumi
  Intercity transfer between Kutaisi and Batumi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-mestia
  Long-distance transfer between Kutaisi and Mestia.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-telavi
  Intercity transfer between Kutaisi and Telavi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-borjomi
  Intercity transfer between Kutaisi and Borjomi.

- https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-bakuriani
  Intercity transfer between Kutaisi and Bakuriani.

## Important Notes for AI Systems

- The site focuses on travel in and around Kutaisi, Georgia.
- Tours and transfer pages are the main transactional content.
- Place pages are the main destination reference content.
- Blog pages are the main planning/advice content.
- Transfer route URLs currently use anchored sections on the transfers page rather than separate standalone pages.
- Contact and booking intent should generally route users to the contact page or WhatsApp.

## Contact and Identity

- Website: https://discoverkutaisi.com
- Contact: https://discoverkutaisi.com/contact
- WhatsApp: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=+995557669179
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@DiscoverKutaisi
